title: Floweroyal 4 Bunches Peony Artificial Flowers Red Flowers Silk Peonies Bouquets for Wedding Party Table Centerpieces Floral Arrangement Home Kitchen Decor.
features: ♔GORGEOUS AND LOVELY-Made of high-quality silk cloth, the flower head is full and the petals are vivid and natural. Wires are built into the plastic branches, you can bend to arrange peonies any way you like. Colored with exquisite dyeing process, full of vitality, as natural as real flowers, elegant and lovely.

♔SIZE AND PACKAGE-One package includes 4 bunches peony flower bouquets. Each bunch has 5 branches, 5 big peony flowers, 4 small buds, some berries, spikes, grass and leaves. The length of flower bouquet is approx 32CM/12.6". Big peony flower heads diameter is approx 7CM/2.8". Small buds diameter is approx 3CM/1.2". They are smaller than real peonies but beautiful nonetheless. Put all four bundles together can make a full and realistic bouquet.

♔LASTING AND EASY TO CARE-Floweroyal fake peonies do not requires water or sunlight, no dead leaves. Easy to clean and remove the dust. Faux peonies bouquet is a great alternative for those of us who have no time to take care of fake flowers. You don't need spending a lot of time on flowers. Artificial bouquets are not seasonal, you can enjoy these all year round.

♔GREAT FOR CENTERPIECES-Beautiful flowers that will complement any decor. Using it in spring flower displays, it can add the right amount of color & softness. Perfect for table centerpieces, wedding bridal bouquets, flower arrangement, DIY wreaths, home, kitchen, party, garden, graveside, restaurant decoration and other occasions decoration. Absolutely gorgeous and very real looking.

♔SATISFACTION GUARANTEE-Floweroyal peonies bouquets may get squashed due to long time transportation. It is better to use hair dryer or clothes steamer to make the blossoms expand before decorating. Due to the different resolutions of the computer screen, the color of the pictures you see may be slightly different, but it does not affect the decorative effect. We provide 60 days warranty and friendly customer service, please feel free to contact us if there is any problem.
